Container.Name: pulse
Container.Overview:
Pulse is a self-hosted host metrics and system telemetry dashboard built in Rust with Yew and Axum.
Key Features: - Real-time CPU load, Memory allocation, Disk storage, and Network traffic streaming via WebSockets. - Lightweight, fast, and responsive. - Security locking using an access PIN.
Container.Requires: The container requires host system statistics query privileges (e.g. access to /proc, /sys). Note: The container runs as nobody:users (UID 99 / GID 100) out of the box.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The host port mapped to the web server (default container port: 4406).

Config.Name: Access PIN
Config.Description: Optional numerical PIN to lock access to the interface. (Optional, not required. Leave empty for unlocked public mode.)
